markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content pipeline to improve output quality and consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Pipeline Paused:** The content pipeline is paused to fix inconsistent outputs (e.g., using "features" vs. "agents"). All articles in review are moved to "in production" to prevent wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**New Artifacts:** Two new artifacts—a detailed product/features doc and a competitor analysis—will be integrated to provide the pipeline with the specific context it needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**New Goal:** The pipeline will be fixed and all 8 existing articles (5 in progress, 3 in review) will be refreshed with new content and header images by January 31st.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Image Style:** The "watercolor" style is approved, but images must be text-free to avoid visual clutter and enable more flexible use.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline Issues

  - [**Problem:** The content pipeline lacks direction, leading to inconsistent outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [**Symptom:** Repeated feedback on core terminology (e.g., "features" vs. "agents") across multiple articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The pipeline lacks specific context on Logic's features and competitive position, causing it to generate generic comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Solution: New Artifacts & Process

  - [**Product/Features Doc:** Azzam's internal doc will be updated and integrated to provide a definitive source of truth on Logic's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:** Azzam's new doc will be integrated as a separate artifact to guide competitive positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [**New Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
    1.  [**Pause Pipeline:** All articles in review are moved to "in production."](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
    2.  [**Update Artifacts:** GrowthX will integrate the new docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
    3.  [**Rerun Articles:** All 8 articles will be re-processed with the updated artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
    4.  [**Resume Review:** Azzam will review the re-processed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Image Strategy & Implementation

  - [**Style:** The "watercolor" style is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Images must be text-free.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids visual clutter and enables flexible use across different layouts.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [**New Articles:** Steve will add a field to Storyblock to store header images.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [**Existing Articles:** Images will be generated automatically when articles are re-processed for the January 31st refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Tooling & Future Strategy

  - [**Scrunch Prompts:** Will be updated after the new artifacts are integrated to avoid resetting the signal-gathering period.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [**New Platform:** GrowthX's new visibility tracking platform will be demoed next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
      - [**Function:** Replaces Scrunch, offering direct user control over context and prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [**Future Planning:** A sync will be scheduled to refresh the content strategy based on Logic's 2026 goals and metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [Update the product/features doc and send to Bailey today.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Move all articles in review to "in production."](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Integrate the product/features and competitor docs into the pipeline artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Coordinate the re-processing of all 8 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Share image comps with Azzam today.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [Update Scrunch prompts after artifact integration.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 strategy refresh sync.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Steve:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Add a header image field to Storyblock.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
      - [Meet the January 31st goal for a fixed pipeline and refreshed articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Zz15SjFxo1vz6xeGHaAydGL-uZis8diY?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
